source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for precise English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, body copy, labels, navigation, and compact dashboard metrics.
layout: An 8px product grid with 8px card radius, radial navigation cues, fine feather-arm dividers, dense dashboard groups, crisp command surfaces, and restrained reef-depth shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent feather star motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a feather star (crinoid), isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: An elegant marine feather star with many radiating feathery arms, crimson central body, gold-tipped pinnules, subtle reef-blue shadow accents, fine articulated arm texture, accurate crinoid anatomy, poised like a living navigation rosette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any arms; keep the full radial silhouette visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves crimson, gold, and reef-blue color detail with crisp edges and no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no coral reef background, no bubbles, no rocks, no sand, no decorative background, no second subject, no border.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Feather Star" derived from the visible transparent feather star cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible feather star: crimson arms, gold pinnules, reef-blue shadows, radial crinoid navigation geometry, coral reef marine context, and elegant feathered arm texture. The board must visibly respect the motif colors and serve as a reference for coding the theme.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board, intended final output 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, precise grid, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Feather Star, Feather Star, Light Mode, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance with short readable labels.
Full UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius scale, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small motif asset preview.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic crisp UI mockup, 8px card radius, light pearl/reef-sand surfaces, crimson primary controls, gold active highlights, reef-blue selection and chart accents, radial navigation cues inspired by feather star arms, elegant marine product navigation system.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: shell white, reef pearl, crimson arm, deep carmine, gold pinnule, reef blue, lagoon teal shadow, coral dusk, abyss ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Feather Star", no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Feather Star design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent feather star cutout and visible light-mode Morphous Feather Star board as references. Preserve the crimson, gold, reef-blue, lagoon-teal, shell-white, and abyss-ink palette roles; radial navigation cues; feathered arm texture; Japanese typography; and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The board must serve as a clear reference for coding dark-mode tokens.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board, intended final output 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, precise grid, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Feather Star, Feather Star, Dark Mode, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Full UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius scale, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small motif asset preview.
Visual details: dark background derived from abyss ink and deep reef blue, card surfaces like midnight coral reef, foreground from shell white and reef pearl, primary crimson controls, gold active highlights, reef-blue and lagoon-teal chart accents, coral dusk warnings, subtle feather-arm texture overlays, crisp 8px-radius product UI, elegant navigation-system mood.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Feather Star".
